package handler

import (
    "net/http"
    "strconv"

    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

func GetUser(c *gin.Context) {
    id, err := strconv.Atoi(c.Param("id"))
    if err != nil {
        c.JSON(http.StatusBadRequest, gin.H{"error": "bad id"})
        return
    }

    c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"id": id})
}
